entity.summary: Fuel-network decentralized exchange using concentrated-liquidity automated market making for on-chain token swaps, liquidity positions, and programmable trading integrations.
entity.notes: The current first-party exchange site is reachable and the official Reactor-Fuel organization publishes a public non-archived DEX implementation and SDK. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Reactor DEX official exchange
evidence.notes: Current first-party domain identifies Reactor as a concentrated-liquidity exchange and remains reachable as the public protocol surface.

evidence.title: Reactor DEX v1 source repository
evidence.notes: Official Reactor-Fuel organization publishes the public, non-archived Reactor DEX v1 repository alongside a current SDK and trading-bot integration repository.
